description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, logs in to the GitLab Container Registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, builds the image using docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE . and pushes it with docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test job that runs using the image built in the previous stage ($CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE) and executes mvn test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
